title: After-Action Report — Defense Model (Range, Errors, Per-Position Ratings, DRS/dWAR, PP-Pitching)
scope: Three intertwined goals: 1. Position-aware defense (INF/OF/catcher specialist groups, plus utility players legit across groups). 2. DRS / dWAR with positional value — surfaces defensive value in WAR alongside batting/pitching. 3. Emergency position-player pitcher in absolute blowouts — strong-arm bench bat takes the mound when team is down 17+ with 6 or fewer outs left.

rationale.item: Defense was the largest open lever called out in the previous AAR (aar-pitcher-tilt-and-elite-talent.md § Known issues)

delegation_events.decision: User picked Errors + DRS depth with visible errors
delegation_events.quote: The user picked Errors + DRS depth with visible errors (errors charge UER, credit ROE to the batter, and surface as discrete events).

delegation_events.decision: Mid-task expansion: position-aware defense attributes, DRS/dWAR, emergency position-player pitcher
delegation_events.quote: Adding defense attributes to players would make this easier for each player, arm, fielding ability by position grouped by most likelies.

actions.description: Player attributes + schema (Stage 1, b376bcb): New fields on Player (defense, arm, defense_infield/outfield/catcher); new columns on players table; ALTER TABLE migrations
Engine wiring: range, errors, catcher arm (Stage 2, b376bcb): Team defense aggregator, range modifier in resolve_contact, error event, error→UER scoring, catcher arm in SB success, renderer updates
Per-position fielding sub-ratings (Stage 3A, 7e3c3f9): league.py rolls primary specialty at full tier, off-group ratings attenuated; UT-slot players force-rolled as utility; 60/40 sub/general blend

Emergency PP-pitcher in extreme blowouts (Stage 3B, 7e3c3f9): Config knobs PP_PITCH_DEFICIT_MIN=17, PP_PITCH_OUTS_LEFT_MAX=6, PP_PITCH_ARM_MIN=0.55; manager.pick_new_pitcher checks gates; prob._pitch_probs blends arm into raw_stuff
DRS / dWAR + UI (Stage 3C, 7e3c3f9): _POSITION_DRS_RANGE table per position; pos_def, DRS, dWAR computed; WAR now total (offense+defense); /stats template gets new columns
Renderer _stat_delta bug fix: added roe, sb, cs, fo to per-phase stat-delta computation field list

risk_posture: Conservative on error attribution: errors are team-attributed, not fielder-attributed (would require spray-angle modeling)
PP-pitcher gating is intentionally tight (17-run deficit AND 6 outs left) to keep feature rare
dWAR is small in small samples (±0.05 range in 18 games); full-season totals are where defense becomes WAR-significant
Range modifier is symmetric (equal magnitude shifts both ends), not asymmetric like MLB

validation_claims.claim: 6/6 identity tests pass — at all neutral inputs the engine still produces pre-realism / pre-defense output
validation_claims.check_method: Run pytest o27/tests for identity suite

validation_claims.claim: All key web routes return 200 on a fresh-seeded 200-game league: /stats, /stats?side=pit, /standings, /leaders, /team/<id>
validation_claims.check_method: Make HTTP requests to each route

validation_claims.claim: Defense profile distribution verified: SS specialists (IF >> OF), CF specialists (OF primary), legit utility players (IF + OF + C all ≥ 50), occasional sub-replacement-primary
validation_claims.check_method: Inspect player defense ratings in seeded league

validation_claims.claim: DRS scaling verified: top-end SS gets ~+0.6 in 18 games (~+5.4 / 162G), bottom-end C gets ~−0.5 in 12 games (~−6.7 / 162G)
validation_claims.check_method: Check DRS leaders in seeded league

non_actions.reason: Would require modeling spray angle (play type determines which fielder makes the play). Without spray angle, attribution would be arbitrary. Per-fielder error attribution waits for spray-angle modeling.
A real manager pulls a slugger for a defensive specialist in the bottom of the half with a 1-run lead. Not modeled.
A C's defense_catcher rating doesn't affect batting stats. Correct for a defensive rating only.
A PP-pitcher's effective Stuff blends with arm, but command/movement come from position-player defaults. Not threading through arm-derived command.
Adding a new BatterStats field requires updating that list. A dataclasses.fields() iteration would be safer.

residual_risks: PP-pitcher rarely fires with current thresholds (once per several hundred games)
dWAR is small in small samples (±1 range in 18 games)
No defensive substitution / late-inning defensive replacement
Catcher arm uses a single rating per team-game (doesn't account for catcher rotation)
Range modifier is symmetric (not asymmetric like MLB)
Position-player pitcher uses pitcher.command/movement defaults of 0.5
Renderer _stat_delta field list still hardcoded (potential future bugs)
open_hooks: Verify PP-pitcher fires occasionally after a multi-season run (currently extremely rare)
Check DRS scaling in a full 162G season run (currently valid in small samples)
Per-fielder error attribution once spray-angle modeling is added
Defensive-substitution manager logic (for late-game defensive shifts)
section_headers_original: Stage 2 — Engine wiring: range, errors, catcher arm (b376bcb)
Stage 3B — Emergency PP-pitcher in extreme blowouts (7e3c3f9)
Errors charge UER over the rest of the spell
PP-pitcher gating: 17-run deficit AND 6 outs left
parser_notes: Well-structured AAR with clear staged implementation. Bug finding (renderer _stat_delta) was significant and well-documented. Honest about limitations (team-level error attribution, symmetric range, etc.).
